reviews.review_description: More like always bored this was a waste of storage got this in 2022 not a single SOUL in this game I do not recommend.

For some reason this game stop working and it was the best game, i laugh til i cried everytime I got on this and now that stuck in the past like your friend that moved this goes to the people that never experienced this level of fun
This game was a absolute masterpiece me and my friend played this every night chilling, playing and laughing. This game is iconic and amazing PLEASE BRING IT BACK 🙏🏽🙏🏽🙏🏽
Took my money
Took all my money and gave me no game

reviews.review_title: Do not buy this game it’s empty!
reviews.review_description: The game no longer works, even though I paid for the game and the extra games I can no longer play it. It’s empty.

It doesn’t work. Once you launch there isn’t a way to play any games and from other reviews I’ve read, there has been no attempt to fix or even address the issue by the developers. This should not be an option to even get this until problems are tesolved or at least addressed.

Don't buy this game! Meda Quest was supposed to take this app. down because the developers abandoned it. You need to go on your phone app. Purchase history, tap the name you want a refund, then tap refund, do this because there are no games to play. If you liked this game when it was running, you will like, "Table Party"! My cousin and I, had a ball playing it! It has different scenes, lots of different kinds of games, some games only play two people like, wack-a-mole, but other games have more player spaces. Just look at it, you won't be disappointed. 😁👍💞
Worked for awhile.  Bought all available game.  Nothing works anymore.   Even after a factory reset of the Oculus.

I bought this to play with my wife. Bought all the add-on games. 

Booted it up for the first time in awhile and there are no games. Period. You just sit in the room. Do we get our money back? Of course not.
Bought it. Bought the extra games and it's inaccessible! What the heck. We should be reimbursed... not cool.

So will there be a refund issued out? We buy the games plus all the packs and you just abandon the project without warning but still keep OUR money?? Is this what Meta and the devs do now? Just a load of bs imo.

We hoped this game would come back. My sister and I bought this game and it's add-ons and it's gone without a refund. Poo. We really enjoyed meeting up to play. Please put it back. Can't find another similar.
I honestly recommended this at one point. But with the game not even working? It makes me have less faith in VR tbh
Like many others, I’ve purchased this game. I keep returning just to see if maybe I could play…..I’m So disappointed.
I went to play and there were no games!
Where are the games?  Shocking, to say the least,  take our money, and we get nothing.
I can't find any off my game ?
I got this to play with my son's when they are with their dad but the games have gone?? It says limited availability?? What's that about?
Paid $10 for the 3 game bundle and nothing works or operates correctly.

Unable to join friends so with that said your unable to play anything at all and I’ve tried on many different occasions please make sure the game works before you release it and allow ppl to spend money on it because I’d be pissed if spent the money for the other games just for me to not even be able to play it at all😬😐

Play board games with your friends in VR, one of the games Treasure is my new Addiction!

Video Review https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gd_S4LIJvyo

There are 4 games (1 is free) its not expensive to buy the extra games and only one person needs to own it. Currently the AI pairing has been reduced to 5 coins which is fine with 100 coins added daily. 

The video goes in depth but its foolish to not download it and try at least crazy 8's and for $5 Treasure is 100 percent worth it for me. Don't skip on this one guys its a work in progress and will have great updates but its still really fun right now.

developer_response.body: Lipnox! Thanks so much for taking the time to do a video-- we can't thank you enough for the effort and mentioning that our game is progressing toward a bigger ecosystem of games. The fix to playing with AI if you own games is on its way on the next update!

reviews.review_description: Game was free but add-on inside are considered as InApp purchased so you can't refund. A nice strategy from the publisher cause all game are juste crap!  Not worth $10! Avoid at all time!

developer_response.body:
Dear lyoxx, our team sincerely wishes to make this awesome for players like yourself and are bummed we missed the opportunity to make this game an awesome experience for you! Would you mind dropping us a line at support@evernevergames.com?

Ooh, and please join our Discord, and under the looking-for-players channel, you might find some new buddies to jam with!
https://discord.com/invite/bccyquvM76

reviews.review_description: Unfortunately, I am kinda bored 😂. Only because there isn't many games! Needs to be a lot more games! And maybe make the room interactive? Fun app, though.

When I tell you this game is laggy I mean it. The first time I got in it put the playing area outside of my guardian. And when I tried to play with my friend it got stuck on the loading screen and I couldn’t even open the oculus menu. After that I had to reset my oculus 5 times for tracking to work. I really wish I could give this game negative stars.

developer_response.body: uontheokayish will you email us at support@evernevergames.com? We want to get more details to see if we can diagnose the issues you experienced.

reviews.review_description: This game sucks I got it to play with my friend and it will not let us play together
Are you guys going to add a mode where you play with people online?

developer_response.body:
Hi Moaz3019!  If you're having issues inviting in Neverboard, please check out our How-To's - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLxRJf7Y4BsyHcSdJagppYY_Sng7R4erJs

If you're wondering if you can play with random people, we don't have that functionality yet, but we're working on it! In the meantime, please join our Discord to find new friends directly from the Neverboard community! https://discord.com/invite/bccyquvM76

reviews.review_description: Great game, just needs more games to play. We play it with our family that is far away, we can chat and catch up on each others lives.  Reasonable price. Hope the dev team plans on making some additions.

developer_response.body:
Hi Chrisoicu812! Thank you for leaving us a review, it’s very much appreciated. We’re actively working towards adding new games and would love to hear any suggestions on our Discord:  https://discord.gg/C5UQ5d2sev 
We will be updating the game as long as we can!

reviews.review_title: Saved Our Quarantine - Kids loved it!
reviews.review_description:
I currently I have Covid and my kids have been missing being able to play/be close with me. We literally sat and played games for two solid hours until our headsets were dying. They were laughing and goofing off and genuinely having a great time. 

Was hesitant because of bad reviews until I realized most of the negative reviews are because of the micro-transactions. Listen, this is how you support developers. I paid a few dollars but had HOURS of enjoyment and hours more to come with my kids. You’ll spend money on major brands but won’t spend $5-$15 to support a game developer. Get the game, pay for the board games and have fun with your kids. And if you can’t afford the other games, you still get Crazy 8s for free and my kids could’ve goofed off on that alone for a long time. 

If I had ANY cons, it was a little confusing at first. We can’t figure out how to make our avatars not be bald and all grey. It definitely could use some updates in the future

developer_response.body: Thank you AuthorUnknown for all the feedback. Hearing the story of being able to play with your kids, laughing and goofing off, is why we built Neverboard. Please reach out to us at support@evernevergames.com and we'll explain how to edit your avatars in the Oculus home menu. Our team would genuinely love to hear from you.

reviews.review_description: So there is online multiplayer ... with your friends only. It won't matchmake you with random people in a lobby to play the games. So I bought the $9.99 bundle, but I can't even play it unless I persuade a few other friends to download it and buy the same games. Sooo I got ripped off and basically can't play it. Only 1 lobby type, and 1 weather to choose from.

developer_response.body: Hey MisterSteve101 we are working on more updates and hope you will check back soon. Your friends do need to download Neverboard to play but they don't have to make a purchase. Only the host has to own any game for everyone to play. We would like to see if there is anything we can do to make it a better experience for you, please email us at support@evernevergames.com.

reviews.review_description: Just trash do yourself a favor and not install
Glitches!!!!
This is boring but

Can’t wait for more content, Awesome idea! It is a little gittery on the hand movements, and I think hand tracking is must though.





Edit: I have no more jittery hand movement it was probably my internet or something

developer_response.body: We'll definitely note the request for hand tracking! Gittery hand movement sounds like a bug we want to squash. If you have a chance reach out to us at support@evernevergames.com with some more details and we will dig into the issue.

reviews.review_description: I am a huge advocate for game/card nights. When I saw that this was a game based off of that I was ecstatic. The only downfall which I hope to see change is that it needs an online play with others, not just friends. One other thing is that there is not many games. I really love this concept of a game and I am hopeful that multiplayer and more games are added very soon. I just wish I didn’t have to wait for friends to get on to play.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback Phloxz! We are working on more features and games and really appreciate you taking the time to play and let us know how we can improve the experience. We'd love to know what games you might hope we add in the future, please reach out to us at support@evernevergames.com and our team will respond.

reviews.review_title: Would be great if it wasn’t so limited
reviews.review_description: If you could meet different people to play. It’s ok. Gets boring with the bots and friends aren’t always around to play at the same time.

They should add 
public game option

reviews.review_title: How can we join our friends?
reviews.review_description: We’ve been trying each other for a while with no luck. How can we join?
great game, only question is how do i edit my avatar.

Here is the one problem. It's p2p, so I can enjoy only one game, and playing that same game gets boring after a while. Honestly I would go with what rec room does and use it for cosmetics, not only does it make better money, it also helps you with your customers as this is really your only problem, you doing not only fixes your problem, it makes the allowing of more games makes this good game enjoyable.

developer_response.body:
Howdy Attacky1! 

While we work on match making, please join our Discord! - https://discord.com/invite/bccyquvM76
And of course, we'd love the chance to turn around your opinion and also gather feedback from you. Please reach out to us anytime through support@evernevergames
